name: hyprland_hyprlock
content: source = ~/.config/omarchy/current/theme/hyprlock.conf general { ignore_empty_input = true } background { monitor = color = $color path = ~/.config/omarchy/current/background blur_passes = 3 } animations { enabled = false } input-field { monitor = size = 650, 100 position = 0, 0 halign = center valign = center inner_color = $inner_color outer_color = $outer_color outline_thickness = 4 font_family = JetBrainsMono Nerd Font font_color = $font_color placeholder_text = Enter Password check_color = $check_color fail_text = $FAIL ($ATTEMPTS) rounding = 0 shadow_passes = 0 fade_on_empty = false } auth { fingerprint:enabled = true }
